# manifest | Apple Developer Documentation

Instance Property# manifest

iOS 18.2+iPadOS 18.2+visionOS 2.2+

```
@NSCopying
var manifest: BEWebAppManifest { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/safariservices/sfaddtohomescreeninfo/manifest#discussion)

A property for the web app manifest. This is only available to apps that can use BrowserEngineKit.

The web app manifest for the bookmark.
